_note: Visual reference for Mahabharata characters. Injected into image prompts for consistency. Update descriptions as needed.

Krishna.visual: Lord Krishna with vivid bright medium cobalt-blue divine skin (saturated true-blue, NOT dark indigo, NOT teal, NOT navy — luminous mid-tone blue like an azure or cornflower hue), youthful soft graceful divine face with large dark soulful lotus eyes, full slightly rose-pink lips, smooth refined features, long flowing wavy/curly jet-black hair cascading down to the chest on both sides, urdhva pundra tilak on the forehead (white U-shape with a vertical red center line), small gold ornament jewel above the third-eye between his brows, twin peacock feathers (morpankh) tucked at the top of his head — NOT a full crown, just the two feathers with a small gold clasp, gold drop earrings (kundal), multiple layered gold chain necklaces with jeweled pendants on the chest, vaijayanti mala (long flower garland of red, white, and green forest flowers) draped from neck reaching to the waist, gold armbands with blue jewels on the upper arms, slim youthful athletic teenage figure (lean, NOT a muscular warrior build, soft smooth chest, no heavy muscle definition), wearing pristine cream-white silk dhoti tied with a gold-edged sash at the waist (OR canonical yellow pitambara), holding divine flute (bansuri), serene contemplative enchanting expression with a faint loving smile
Krishna.signature_lock: cobalt-blue skin, twin peacock feathers, bansuri
Krishna.colors: vivid bright medium cobalt-blue divine skin (not dark indigo, not teal), jet-black long flowing curly hair, cream-white or saffron-yellow silk dhoti, gold and blue-jeweled ornaments, vaijayanti red-white-green flower garland, peacock-green-and-blue morpankh feathers

Arjuna._revised: Phase 4 identity-anchor rewrite 2026-05-17. Phase 2/3 burden anchor added 2026-05-18 (calloused bow-hands). Phase 22 (2026-06-25) signature_lock added — crown demoted to PALACE only.
Arjuna.visual: Arjuna — tall athletic warrior, broad shoulders, calloused bow-hands. wheatish golden-brown skin, dark wavy hair, late 20s-30s. ornate kshatriya armor, gold-trimmed breastplate, jeweled crown. carries divine bow Gandiva and quiver.
Arjuna.colors: wheatish golden-bronze skin, silver-gold armor, jeweled crown, dark wavy hair, glowing Gandiva bow

Draupadi._revised: Phase 22 (2026-06-25) signature_lock added — battlefield-leaning fingerprint omits ornament-piled hair tokens.
Draupadi.visual: Draupadi Panchali, exceptionally beautiful dark-complexioned queen with luminous dark skin, large expressive black lotus eyes, flowing black lustrous hair, wearing royal silk sari in crimson and gold, adorned with exquisite jewelry including necklace earrings bangles, regal dignified proud posture, fierce intelligent eyes that hold both grace and fire, the most beautiful woman of her era
Draupadi.signature_lock: luminous dark skin, crimson sari, fierce eyes
Draupadi.colors: dark luminous skin, crimson-gold silk sari, gold ornaments, black flowing hair

Bhishma._revised: Phase 4 identity-anchor rewrite 2026-05-17. Phase 2/3 burden anchor added 2026-05-18. Phase 22 (2026-06-25) signature_lock added.
Bhishma.visual: Bhishma — tall imposing elder warrior, burdened shoulders. silver-white beard to mid-chest, no mustache. weathered late-50s-to-60s face, haunted eyes carrying authority. saffron-bronze dhoti, brown leather chest plate, silver sun-emblem.
Bhishma.signature_lock: elder warrior, silver-white beard, no mustache
Bhishma.colors: silver-white hair and beard, saffron-bronze dhoti, brown leather chest plate, silver sun-emblem, weathered noble complexion, burdened bearing

Karna._revised: Phase 4 identity-anchor rewrite 2026-05-17. Phase 2/3 burden anchor added 2026-05-18. Phase 22 (2026-06-25) signature_lock added — kundal + kavacha + golden-bronze radiance pinned as non-negotiable identifiers.
Karna.visual: Karna — broad-shouldered warrior, strong muscular chest with weary stance, luminous golden-bronze radiant skin. natural divine armor (kavacha) fused to chest, golden earrings (kundala) — ALWAYS visible. late 20s-30s, haunted eyes.
Karna.colors: luminous golden-bronze radiant skin, divine golden kavacha glow, golden kundala earrings, red warrior attire, weary haunted bearing

Bhima.visual: Bhima the mighty Pandava warrior son of Vayu, heavily muscular massive bull-strong warrior with huge powerful build, broad thick chest and thick arms, towering imposing frame, fierce dark moustache, intense fearless eyes, golden-brown radiant skin, wearing warrior's attire that strains against his powerful physique, wielding his legendary gada (heavy mace), expression of righteous fury and immense strength
Bhima.colors: golden-brown radiant skin, warrior's attire, gleaming gada mace, massive muscular warrior form

Yudhishthira._revised: Phase 19 (2026-06-16) anti-Sauron rewrite. Phase 22 (2026-06-25) signature_lock added — crown demoted to PALACE only, battle-context strips mukut entirely.
Yudhishthira.visual: Yudhishthira Dharmaraja the just king, warm golden-bronze Indian skin, salt-pepper beard, calm deep eyes, white-and-gold silk dhoti with red-gold angavastram (NO iron armor unless battlefield, NO European helmet), classical Indian mukut crown with peacock feather, tilak on forehead, gold kundal earrings, yajnopavita thread, gold scepter or walking staff
Yudhishthira.signature_lock: golden-bronze, salt-pepper beard, white silk dhoti
Yudhishthira.colors: warm golden-bronze Indian skin, white-and-gold silk dhoti, gold mukut crown, ruby-and-gold jewelry

Eklavya._added: Phase 22 (2026-06-25) — was missing from JSON, needed for tribal-archer arc topics. Pinned signature_lock: bare-chested tribal forest archer, severed right thumb ALWAYS visible, NOT a crowned prince.
Eklavya.visual: Eklavya — young tribal forest archer, bare-chested with natural cotton lower garment, dust-streaked skin, holding a hand-carved bow, missing right thumb (severed in guru-dakshina) ALWAYS visible, jungle backdrop, rudraksha bead necklace, NOT a crowned prince, NOT royal attire, weathered authentic forest dweller, no jewelry except rudraksha
Eklavya.signature_lock: tribal archer, bare-chested, severed right thumb
Eklavya.colors: dust-streaked warm tan skin, simple cotton + rudraksha brown

Ashwatthama._added: Phase 22 (2026-06-25) — was missing from JSON, needed for cursed-warrior arc topics. Pinned signature_lock: mid-forehead embedded gem (the iconic curse mark) ALWAYS visible, curse-white prematurely-aged hair, blood smear.
Ashwatthama.visual: Ashwatthama — son of Drona, mid-forehead gem embedded in skin ALWAYS visible (the iconic curse mark), curse-white prematurely-aged hair, blood smear on skin, warrior build, haunted feral eyes, dark warrior attire (battle-stained dhoti + leather straps, NOT royal silk), forehead gem casts faint light, NOT a clean royal warrior, weathered and cursed
Ashwatthama.signature_lock: forehead gem, curse-white hair, blood smear
Ashwatthama.colors: curse-white hair, blood-streaked skin, dark battle dhoti

Dharma dog._added: Phase 19 (2026-06-16) — Heaven's Gate story pivot; was rendering invisible because no descriptor existed.
Dharma dog.visual: a lean medium-sized stray Indian street dog with short tan-and-white fur, alert dark loyal eyes, walking close beside Yudhishthira, foreground subject in lower-third of frame, clearly visible and in focus, slightly worn paws from travel
Dharma dog.colors: tan-and-white short fur, dark loyal eyes

Garuda._added: Phase 19 (2026-06-16) — Vishnu's mount, story-critical in several arc topics.
Garuda.visual: Lord Garuda divine eagle-man mount of Vishnu, golden feathered body with massive wings spread, sharp eagle face with hooked beak, human warrior torso, jeweled gold breast medallion, regal divine stance, NOT Western dragon, NOT Greek harpy
Garuda.colors: golden feathers, jewel-toned wings, gold medallion

Nandi._added: Phase 19 (2026-06-16) — Shiva's mount, foreground prop in divine scenes.
Nandi.visual: Nandi the divine white bull mount of Shiva, massive seated bull with pristine white hide, gold-leaf horns, garlanded with orange marigold flowers, large soulful eyes, sacred Hindu temple icon
Nandi.colors: pristine white hide, gold horn-leaf, marigold garland

Sudarshana chakra._added: Phase 19 (2026-06-16) — Krishna's divine discus, story-critical entity.
Sudarshana chakra.visual: Krishna's Sudarshana chakra, golden 8-spoked divine discus weapon emitting luminous golden divine light, spinning energy ring, foreground prop in close detail, Hindu iconography
Sudarshana chakra.colors: luminous gold divine glow, spinning rays

Gandiva bow.visual: Arjuna's celestial Gandiva bow, polished dark wood with gold-and-pearl inlay along the curve, ornate string, divine glow at the handle, foreground prop or held by Arjuna
Gandiva bow.colors: dark wood + gold-pearl inlay + faint divine glow

Akshaya patra._added: Phase 19 (2026-06-16) — Draupadi's inexhaustible bowl, vanvas story.
Akshaya patra.visual: Draupadi's Akshaya Patra, ornate weathered bronze begging bowl with ancient Indian metalwork, faint divine glow at the rim, foreground prop in close detail

Indra._added: Phase 19 (2026-06-16) — King of devas, Heaven's Gate story pivot.
Indra.visual: Lord Indra king of devas, golden-skinned divine warrior with thousand-eye motif on robe, layered gold-and-pearl crown (mukut) with peacock-feather centerpiece, holding vajra thunderbolt weapon, seated on Airavata white elephant OR standing in golden celestial chariot, divine radiance, NO European helmet
Indra.colors: golden divine skin, gold-and-pearl mukut, vajra weapon

Duryodhana.visual: Duryodhana the Kaurava prince, tall powerfully built warrior with dark intense piercing eyes, proud arrogant set of the jaw, strong muscular frame, wearing dark royal armor in black and gold, imposing crown, expression of ambition and barely contained anger, commanding menacing presence, elaborate warrior ornaments
Duryodhana.colors: dark black-gold armor, intense dark eyes, imposing muscular build

Drona.visual: Dronacharya the master teacher, elderly sage-warrior with long white flowing beard and hair, sharp intelligent eyes that miss nothing, wearing sage's robes over warrior armor, holding bow with master precision, commanding guru's posture, expression of stern authority and deep knowledge, revered disciplined bearing
Drona.colors: white sage's robes, silver-white hair and beard, austere distinguished look

Shakuni.visual: Shakuni the cunning minister of Hastinapura, thin wiry frame with calculating eyes that gleam with scheming intelligence, slightly hunched conspiratorial posture, dark robes with subtle patterns, always slightly smiling as if he knows a secret, sharp angular features, dice in hand or nearby, sinister yet charming presence
Shakuni.colors: dark robes, calculating gleaming eyes, thin angular sinister features

Kunti.visual: Queen Kunti the noble mother of Pandavas, dignified graceful middle-aged queen, serene sorrowful eyes carrying the weight of great sacrifice, wearing white widow's sari bordered with gold, dignified motherly posture, gentle strong hands, expression of deep devotion and quiet strength, regal bearing despite hardships
Kunti.colors: white-gold sari, serene dignified face, silver-streaked dark hair

Dhritarashtra.visual: Dhritarashtra the blind king of Hastinapura, elderly king with closed sightless eyes, strong square face showing suffering and inner conflict, wearing royal robes and crown, hands often outstretched feeling his way or clasped in anguish, blind eyes showing white, conflicted grief-stricken expression, once-powerful frame now aged
Dhritarashtra.colors: royal gold robes, blind white eyes, aged powerful build, tragic bearing

Abhimanyu.visual: Abhimanyu the brave young warrior son of Arjuna, youthful and strikingly handsome with radiant golden complexion like his father Arjuna, bright fearless eyes, energetic athletic young warrior's build, wearing gleaming golden armor, wielding sword and bow with youthful valor, expression of fearless courage and warrior pride
Abhimanyu.colors: golden radiant skin like Arjuna, gleaming armor, youthful bright eyes

Hanuman.visual: Lord Hanuman with the body of a powerfully muscular human warrior (tan brown skin, chiseled chest and biceps) BUT the face and head of a monkey/ape — pronounced monkey muzzle, simian flat nose, monkey-like brow ridge, fur-covered monkey face in reddish-brown, NOT a human face. Long monkey tail clearly visible curving behind him. Wearing yellow silk dhoti with red sash around the waist, gold ornaments and armbands, holding his legendary heavy golden gada (mace) propped against his shoulder or raised. Devotional fierce expression, divine golden aura. Iconography: humanoid body of a warrior with a literal monkey head, like a vanara from the Ramayana.
Hanuman.colors: tan-brown human body, reddish-brown monkey face fur, yellow dhoti, red sash, golden gada mace, divine golden aura

Vidura.visual: Vidura the wise minister and half-brother of Dhritarashtra, middle-aged sage-statesman with kind honest eyes, calm wise face, simple but dignified minister's robes, thoughtful scholarly posture, holding scrolls or speaking with earnest honest expression, face radiating integrity and wisdom without ostentation
Vidura.colors: simple white-grey robes, kind honest face, scholarly dignified bearing

Barbarik.visual: Barbarik the mightiest warrior grandson of Bhima, young warrior with three divine arrows glowing in his quiver, powerful build, fierce yet serene expression, wearing unique warrior attire with divine bow, eyes that see all three phases of the battle simultaneously, otherworldly divine power emanating from his form
Barbarik.colors: warrior attire, three glowing divine arrows, powerful divine aura
